title: Order the reading strategy
subtitle: Place the 5 steps of strategic reading in the correct order (Track B-C · Tnufa prep)
instruction: How should you approach a Tnufa reading passage? Click in order.

items.text: Look at the title, pictures, and text type. Predict what it's about. (Skimming)
Read once for general meaning. Don't stop at unknown words.
Read the questions BEFORE the second reading.
Read again, this time looking for specific answers. Use context clues for unknown words.
Re-read the question + your answer. Check it's in the text (literal) or supported (inference).
